Object.Name: GEISAPlatformMonitoring
Object.Description1:
This LwM2M Object provides monitoring and operational visibility for the GEISA Platform components that implement ADM, local GEISA API services, application message bridging, local monitoring, and upstream reporting.
Each Object Instance represents the GEISA Platform's monitoring view for one GEISA Platform component or for an aggregate GEISA Platform scope. This Object is intended for EMA health, LwM2M client health, registration and bootstrap state, upstream reporting health, local GEISA API broker or service health, app message bridge health, local monitoring engine health, event log service health, and upstream queue or spool health.
This Object does not report host-wide device resource totals, app runtime health, app communication accounting, app-originated semantic messages, or durable event log records. Host-wide device resource and network monitoring is reported through the GEISA Host Monitoring Object. App runtime health and resource monitoring is reported through the GEISA App Monitoring Object. App communication accounting, quota visibility, and throttling state are reported through the GEISA App Accounting Object. App-originated semantic messages such as alarms, events, telemetry, status, commands, and configuration are carried by the GEISA App Messaging Object. Durable logs and retrievable event records are carried by the Event Log Object.

Item.Name: Component Type
Item.Description:
Type of GEISA Platform component represented by this Object Instance.
0 = Unknown 1 = Aggregate GEISA Platform 2 = Edge Management Agent 3 = LwM2M client 4 = GEISA API broker 5 = GEISA API service or daemon 6 = App message bridge 7 = Local monitoring engine 8 = Event log service 9 = Upstream queue or spool service 10 = Security or credential service 11..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined component types 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific component types

Item.Name: Component Name
Item.Description: Human-readable component name assigned by the platform. This value is intended for display, diagnostics, and log correlation.

Item.Name: Component Instance ID
Item.Description: Platform-local identifier for the component instance represented by this Object Instance. This value is intended for correlation with logs, events, and platform diagnostics.

Item.Name: Component Version
Item.Description: Version of the GEISA Platform component, when available.

Item.Name: Component Health State
Item.Description:
Current health state for this GEISA Platform component.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Failed 4 = Disabled 5 = Not reporting 6 = Starting 7 = Stopping 8..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific health states

Item.Name: Health Reason
Item.Description: Short platform-generated reason associated with the current Component Health State.

Item.Name: Last Health Transition Time
Item.Description: Time at which the Component Health State most recently changed.

Item.Name: Component Start Time
Item.Description: Time at which the current or most recent execution of the component started.

Item.Name: Restart Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of component restarts during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: Monitoring Window
Item.Description: Monitoring window in seconds used for current-period counters and derived health evaluation for this component.

Item.Name: Monitoring Period Start Time
Item.Description: Start time for the active monitoring period used by current-period counters and derived health state.

Item.Name: Last Update Timestamp
Item.Description: Time at which the platform last updated this GEISA Platform Monitoring Object Instance.

Item.Name: LwM2M Registration State
Item.Description:
Current LwM2M registration state, when this Object Instance represents an EMA, LwM2M client, or aggregate GEISA Platform scope.
0 = Unknown 1 = Not registered 2 = Registering 3 = Registered 4 = Registration update pending 5 = Registration failed 6 = Registration expired 7 = Deregistering 8..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined registration states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific registration states

Item.Name: Last Registration Time
Item.Description: Time of the most recent successful LwM2M registration.

Item.Name: Last Registration Update Time
Item.Description: Time of the most recent successful LwM2M registration update.

Item.Name: Registration Lifetime
Item.Description: Current LwM2M registration lifetime in seconds.

Item.Name: Bootstrap State
Item.Description:
Current bootstrap state, when applicable.
0 = Unknown 1 = Not required 2 = Required 3 = In progress 4 = Completed 5 = Failed 6..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined bootstrap states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific bootstrap states

Item.Name: Upstream Communication State
Item.Description:
Current upstream communication state for GEISA Platform reporting.
0 = Unknown 1 = Disabled 2 = Enabled down 3 = Enabled up 4 = Degraded 5 = Backlogged 6 = Blocked by policy 7..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined upstream communication states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific upstream communication states

Item.Name: Last Upstream Success Time
Item.Description: Time of the most recent successful upstream GEISA Platform communication.

Item.Name: Last Upstream Error Time
Item.Description: Time of the most recent upstream GEISA Platform communication error.

Item.Name: Upstream Error Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of upstream GEISA Platform communication errors during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: Active Observe Count
Item.Description: Number of active LwM2M Observe relationships currently maintained by this component or aggregate GEISA Platform scope.

Item.Name: Failed Notify Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of LwM2M Notify delivery failures during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: Suppressed Event Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of locally detected GEISA Platform events suppressed during the current monitoring period due to rate limiting, duplicate suppression, hysteresis, or operator policy.

Item.Name: Dropped Event Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of locally detected GEISA Platform events dropped during the current monitoring period because they could not be queued, persisted, or delivered.

Item.Name: Queue Health State
Item.Description:
Health state of the upstream queue or spool associated with this component.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Full 4 = Failed 5 = Disabled 6..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined queue health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific queue health states

Item.Name: Pending Upstream Messages
Item.Description: Number of pending upstream GEISA Platform messages currently queued or spooled for delivery.

Item.Name: Pending Upstream Bytes
Item.Description: Total bytes currently queued or spooled for upstream GEISA Platform delivery.

Item.Name: Oldest Pending Message Time
Item.Description: Timestamp of the oldest pending upstream GEISA Platform message currently queued or spooled for delivery.

Item.Name: Dropped Upstream Messages Current Period
Item.Description: Number of upstream GEISA Platform messages dropped during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: Expired Upstream Messages Current Period
Item.Description: Number of queued or spooled upstream GEISA Platform messages that expired before successful delivery during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: API Broker Health State
Item.Description:
Health state of the local GEISA API broker, when applicable.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Failed 4 = Disabled 5..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined API broker health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific API broker health states

Item.Name: API Request Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of GEISA API requests observed during the current monitoring period, when this component can report API request activity.

Item.Name: API Error Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of GEISA API errors observed during the current monitoring period, when this component can report API error activity.

Item.Name: Unauthorized API Attempt Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of unauthorized GEISA API access attempts observed during the current monitoring period.

Item.Name: App Message Bridge Health State
Item.Description:
Health state of the local app message bridge that connects GEISA API messaging to ADM/LwM2M upstream or downstream handling, when applicable.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Failed 4 = Disabled 5..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined bridge health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific bridge health states

Item.Name: Event Log Service Health State
Item.Description:
Health state of the local event log service or durable event recording path, when applicable.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Failed 4 = Disabled 5..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined event log health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific event log health states

Item.Name: Local Monitoring Engine Health State
Item.Description:
Health state of the local monitoring engine responsible for sampling, aggregation, condition evaluation, and state transition reporting, when applicable.
0 = Unknown 1 = Healthy 2 = Degraded 3 = Failed 4 = Disabled 5..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined monitoring engine health states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific monitoring engine health states

Item.Name: Last Durable Event Time
Item.Description: Time at which this component most recently wrote or caused a durable event or log record to be written.

Item.Name: Request Status Refresh
Item.Description: Request that the platform refresh the current status of this GEISA Platform component and update this Object Instance.

Item.Name: Reset Monitoring Counters
Item.Description: Reset current-period monitoring counters for this Object Instance and start a new monitoring period. Platforms MAY deny this operation according to operator policy.

Item.Name: Flush Upstream Queue
Item.Description: Request immediate delivery of queued or spooled upstream GEISA Platform messages associated with this component. Platforms MAY deny this operation according to operator policy or connectivity state.

Item.Name: Restart Component
Item.Description: Request restart of the GEISA Platform component represented by this Object Instance. Platforms MAY deny this operation according to operator policy, component type, device state, or safety considerations.
